steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Looking at the line of best fit, I can identify two points it passes through: at temperature 28°C, the line is at 240 people, and at temperature 32°C, the line is at 480 people. These give us the points (28, 240) and (32, 480).

steps.title: Calculate the slope and line equation
Evaluate at x = 32 and round
steps.content:
Substituting $x = 32$ into the line equation:
$$y = 60(32) - 1440 = 1920 - 1440 = 480$$
Rounding 480 to the nearest 10 gives 480 people.
That matches choice 480.
